title: salix × thellungii
intro: Salix × thellungii, also known as the hybrid willow, is a cross between the black willow (Salix nigra) and the white willow (Salix alba), resulting in a unique and versatile plant species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its salicin content, which is a natural analgesic and anti-inflammatory compound. The health benefits of Salix × thellungii include relief from headaches, fever, and joint pain, as well as potential antiseptic and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Salix × thellungii can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, offering a natural remedy for various health concerns.
